Lesson1/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit Java 1.8 source and target configuration from the maven-compiler-plugin to allow the project to compile with the default JDK version (Java 11).
Lesson1/pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with source/target 1.8 on a JDK 11 environment may cause warnings or conflicts with newer language features; removing it aligns the build with the target JDK 11 baseline.
